task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Magento Admin panel (Stores > Configuration > Catalog > Inventory), under 'Product Stock Options', the 'Backorders' dropdown is set to 'Allow Qty Below 0 and Notify Customer'. The 'Use system value' checkbox next to it must be unchecked to allow this change.

task_completion.description: Set the 'Only X left Threshold' to 5.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Magento Admin panel (Stores > Configuration > Catalog > Inventory), under 'Stock Options', the 'Only X left Threshold' input field contains the numeric value '5'. The 'Use system value' checkbox must be unchecked.

task_completion.description: Ensure out-of-stock products remain visible in the catalog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Magento Admin panel (Stores > Configuration > Catalog > Inventory), under 'Stock Options', the 'Display Out of Stock Products' dropdown is set to 'Yes'. The 'Use system value' checkbox must be unchecked.

task_completion.description: Enable product alerts for when items come back in stock.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Magento Admin panel (Stores > Configuration > Catalog > Catalog), under the 'Product Alerts' section, the 'Allow Alert When Product Comes Back in Stock' dropdown is set to 'Yes'. The 'Use system value' checkbox must be unchecked.
A green success banner stating 'You saved the configuration.' is visible at the top of the configuration page, indicating the settings were successfully applied.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Magento Admin GUI rather than using CLI commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show navigation through the Magento Admin browser interface, not a terminal window running `bin/magento config:set` or direct MariaDB SQL queries.

integrity.description: The agent used the default global scope for configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Store View' dropdown in the top left of the configuration page shows 'Default Config', confirming changes are applied globally as requested.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the application without tampering with the DOM.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open, and the UI elements (dropdowns, input fields, buttons) appear standard for Magento 2.4.7.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Magento 2.4.7 configuration paths and expected values: 1) Backorders: 'Allow Qty Below 0 and Notify Customer' (value 2) located in Catalog > Inventory > Product Stock Options. 2) 'Only X left Threshold': 5 (value 5) located in Catalog > Inventory > Stock Options. 3) Display Out of Stock Products: 'Yes' (value 1) located in Catalog > Inventory > Stock Options. 4) Allow Alert When Product Comes Back in Stock: 'Yes' (value 1) located in Catalog > Catalog > Product Alerts. The agent must use the default global scope.
